person_profile: Linda is 31, single, outspoken, and very bright. She majored in philosophy and was deeply concerned with discrimination and social justice as a student.
narrow_conjunction: Linda is a bank teller and is active in the feminist movement.

person_profile: Mark is a 45-year-old man who reads the Financial Times daily, drives a luxury car, and frequently attends charity galas in the city.
broad_category: Mark donates to at least one charity.
narrow_conjunction: Mark donates to at least one charity and earns over $500,000 per year.

person_profile: Sara is a 28-year-old who runs marathons, meal-preps on Sundays, follows several nutrition influencers online, and avoids processed food.
narrow_conjunction: Sara eats a balanced diet and has never consumed fast food in the past year.

person_profile: David studied computer science, contributed to open-source projects in college, and keeps a meticulously organized GitHub profile with daily commits.
narrow_conjunction: David works in technology and has strong opinions about programming language choice.

person_profile: Elena grew up speaking three languages, spent two years abroad, and writes a travel blog documenting cultural differences in cuisine and etiquette.
narrow_conjunction: Elena has traveled internationally and has visited more than 20 countries.
